summary_en: 100,000 shares (1.3% of outstanding), ¥3.5B limit, open-market purchase via TSE, May 28, 2026–Mar 31, 2027. Execution subject to investment opportunities and market conditions.
title_en: Notice regarding authorization of share acquisition (repurchase of own shares pursuant to the Articles of Incorporation under Article 165, Paragraph 2 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief:
Minato Holdings announced on May 27, 2026 that its board has authorized a share repurchase program. The company will acquire up to 100,000 shares (1.3% of shares outstanding excluding treasury stock) for an aggregate amount not to exceed ¥3.5 billion through open-market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange from May 28, 2026 through March 31, 2027.

The stated purposes are shareholder profit return, use in M&A activities, allocation to restricted-stock awards for directors and employees, and enabling flexible capital allocation in response to changing business conditions. As of March 31, 2026, the company held 485,404 treasury shares against 7,440,310 shares outstanding (excluding treasury).

The company notes that execution is not guaranteed and may be curtailed or suspended depending on investment opportunities and market conditions.
